report_title: Ferndale Field Guide — Phoenix Error Report
window: 2026-05-26 .. 2026-06-02 (7d, UTC). NOTE: sample/illustrative data — not from a live instance.

families.root_cause: A long identification session accumulates the full photo+chat history every call; for user_7f3c2a it grew past the model's 128k limit and never recovers, so every turn fails and is retried.
families.action: Cap/summarize session history under a token budget; add a per-session circuit breaker that stops replaying a maxed-out session.

families.root_cause: Some uploads are HEIC variants the preprocessor can't decode, so identification fails before the model runs.
families.action: Transcode/validate images client-side (HEIC→JPEG); reject unsupported formats with a friendly message.

families.root_cause: Vision endpoint returns 429 (queue full) during traffic spikes.
families.action: Add retry-with-exponential-backoff; consider a fallback vision model for sustained load.

recommendations.issue: Runaway context-window storm in ferndale_qa — one session looping ~40 failures.
recommendations.action: Reset/clear the stuck session; cap history and add a circuit breaker so it can't recur.

recommendations.issue: Image decode failures hit real users in prod.
recommendations.action: Transcode HEIC client-side; validate before upload.
Alert on error-rate spikes per project so a single looping session can't burn quota silently.

user_notes.user_7f3c2a: Storm — same identify request looping (sample data).
